source_commit: Genio android13 HEAD; byte-identical to NothingOSS android_kernel_5.15_nothing_mt6886 mt6886/Pacman/t (verified 2026-04-29)
size_method: sizeof() via gcc on the actual header

ioctls.name: APU_MDW_IOCTL_HANDSHAKE

ops.name: MDW_HS_IOCTL_OP_MEM
ops.purpose: memory pool descriptor: type, start, size

ioctls.first_call_canary: MDW_HS_IOCTL_OP_BASIC — if version reply mismatches uapi.rs assumptions, stop and re-derive structs

ioctls.name: APU_MDW_IOCTL_MEM

ops.name: MDW_MEM_IOCTL_ALLOC
ops.purpose: allocate dma-buf-backed buffer; returns u64 handle

ops.name: MDW_MEM_IOCTL_MAP
ops.purpose: map an external dma-buf fd into the apusys context

ioctls.notes: ALLOC returns a dma-buf fd disguised as u64 handle. To drive end-to-end you also need /dev/dma_heap/* (system_uncached / mtk_mm-uncached). userspace mmap() the handle to get a CPU view.

ioctls.name: APU_MDW_IOCTL_CMD

ops.name: MDW_CMD_IOCTL_RUN
ops.purpose: submit command graph (subcmds + links + cmdbufs) for APU execution

ops.name: MDW_CMD_IOCTL_RUN_STALE
ops.purpose: re-submit a previously-built command without rebuilding

ops.name: MDW_CMD_IOCTL_DEL
ops.purpose: delete/cancel a queued or running command

cmdbuf_dir_enum.name: MDW_CB_BIDIRECTIONAL
cmdbuf_dir_enum.purpose: copy in before exec, copy out after

ioctls.subcmd_struct: mdw_subcmd_info — likely shorter on MT6886 vs Genio android13. Mismatch → -EFAULT canary fires immediately on first RUN.

ops.name: MDW_UTIL_IOCTL_SETPOWER
ops.purpose: force-on a device clock domain (power hint)

ops.name: MDW_UTIL_IOCTL_UCMD
ops.purpose: user command: dev_type + size + handle to a user-defined opaque blob

open_failure_modes.EACCES: stock SELinux blocks shell domain; KernelSU sepolicy patch required
open_failure_modes.ENODEV: kernel built without apusys driver (unlikely on stock Pacman)
open_failure_modes.EFAULT_on_first_cmd: struct size mismatch; re-derive from strace before submitting CMD ioctl

verification_recipe: rooted phone with KernelSU + sepolicy patch:  allow shell apusys_device:chr_file { read write open ioctl };
issue HANDSHAKE/BASIC first; capture version, dev_bitmask, mem_bitmask, meta_size
if meta_size != 32 or dev_bitmask is 0, stop and strace /vendor/bin/neuronrt to capture the actual ABI
